rulings.Case Title: ELEONOR SABALVARO et al VS. REYNALDO P RODRIGUEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Referees Notice Of Report Of Sale And Motion For An Order A Confirming Referees Sale Of Partition Property B Approving Compensation And Counsel C Approving Distribution Of Proceeds And D Granting Related Relief
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 26, 2016 line 2. PARTITION REFEREE AMY HARRINGTON's Motion For An Order Confirming Referees Sale Of Partition Property, Approving Compensation to referee And Counsel, Approving Distribution Of Proceeds And Granting Related Relief GRANTED, the sale is confirmed, subject to overbid. All the distributions shall be made from the escrow in accordance with the Referee's proposal and the judgment, including the 50/50 distribution to the parties. Petitioner's request for partial distribution and for attorney's fees is DENIED. CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MELVIN LIM ET AL VS. MICHELLE HUANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 26, 2016 line 7. DEFENDANT TOMMY PAYNE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurer is sustained with 5-day leave to amend to allege service of Form 1007 per SFRO 37.9(c). Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Complaint is not uncertain. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
